title: Evangelion Pic Thread 11 Maris Middlesex Manor of Mayhem and Fantabulous Foppery
display_title: Evangelion Pic Thread 11 Maris Middlesex Manor of Mayhem and Fantabulous Foppery
wikitext:
[]: Evangelion Pic Thread 11: Mari's Middlesex Manor of Mayhem and Fantabulous Foppery             Quote Post by UrsusArctos » Wed Dec 02, 2020 12:58 am In fact this is the first post of the now defunct thread “Evangelion 3.0 + 1.0 Spoiler Fanart, Merchandise and Cosplay”. To see the OP of this thread, click here . This is the thread for post-January 22 fanart, merchandise and cosplay pertaining to 3.0 + 1.0. All fanart and cosplay based on scenes that are not publicly available prior to the release go in here. Fanart, merchandise and cosplay based on pre-release materials go into the regular fanart and cosplay threads as well as the regular merchandise threads like the Evangelion Figures thread.

[]: Re: Evangelion 3.0 + 1.0 Spoiler Fanart, Merchandise and Cosplay             Quote Post by Jayfive » Sun Mar 07, 2021 4:48 pm Front cover of the booklet courtesy of 4chan: SPOILER: Show

[]: Re: Evangelion 3.0 + 1.0 Spoiler Fanart, Merchandise and Cosplay             Quote Post by Jayfive » Sun Mar 07, 2021 5:24 pm Shot from the booklet of SPOILER: Show

[]: Re: Evangelion 3.0 + 1.0 Spoiler Fanart, Merchandise and Cosplay             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Sun Mar 07, 2021 6:00 pm Jayfive -- Rather than linking 4chan, which is ephemeral, copy to an image hosting service. I've fixed up the posts above for you.

[]: Re: Evangelion 3.0 + 1.0 Spoiler Fanart, Merchandise and Cosplay             Quote Post by Jayfive » Sun Mar 07, 2021 6:12 pm Right you are, combination of not being back here for a while and the bad rush to get something concrete out there amongst the tidalwave of iffy information.

[]: Re: Evangelion 3.0 + 1.0 Spoiler Fanart, Merchandise and Cosplay             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Sun Mar 07, 2021 6:48 pm Jayfive wrote: Scans of a booklet: https://eva-info.jp/eva_moviebooklet I guess there's two booklets, as this one is just adverts for merch from start to finish. Zero spoilers.

[]: Re: Evangelion 3.0 + 1.0 Spoiler Fanart, Merchandise and Cosplay             Quote Post by Tajai » Sun Mar 07, 2021 8:41 pm Another booklet screenshot just came out.

[]: Re: Evangelion 3.0 + 1.0 Spoiler Fanart, Merchandise and Cosplay             Quote Post by Ghostboy_1993 » Sun Mar 07, 2021 8:45 pm Cover of the information booklet: SPOILER: Show

[]: Re: Evangelion 3.0 + 1.0 Spoiler Fanart, Merchandise and Cosplay             Quote Post by Electreel » Sun Mar 07, 2021 8:47 pm Ghostboy_1993 wrote: Cover of the information booklet: https://twitter.com/Ywestside/status/13 ... 06721?s=19

[]: Re: Evangelion 3.0 + 1.0 Spoiler Fanart, Merchandise and Cosplay             Quote Post by hui43210 » Sun Mar 07, 2021 8:52 pm That's the most Anno Eva I've ever seen lol. A hideous abomination of several Evas. Edit: never mind, that's saying goodbye to Evangelion!

[]: Re: Evangelion 3.0 + 1.0 Spoiler Fanart, Merchandise and Cosplay             Quote Post by Blockio » Sun Mar 07, 2021 8:55 pm OOooooo I love this

[]: Re: Evangelion 3.0 + 1.0 Spoiler Fanart, Merchandise and Cosplay             Quote Post by Tajai » Sun Mar 07, 2021 8:55 pm New screenshot, has a lot of stuff in it. SPOILER: Show
